CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, array_column Array(Int32), nested_column Nested(sub_id UInt32, sub_name String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (parent_id UInt32, child Nested(child_id UInt32, child_name String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY parent_id;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (user_id UInt32, details Nested(age UInt8, address String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY user_id;
INSERT INTO complex_table VALUES (1, (25, '123 Main St')),(2, (30, '456 Elm St'));
CREATE TABLE subcolumns_table (info Nested(age UInt8, location String, hobbies Array(String))) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY info.age;
CREATE TABLE join_table (id UInt32, group_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, group_id FROM join_table;
